title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — Asia-Pacific — Q2 2026
summary: Australia's dual-enforcement pressure on Travel Rule plus stablecoin payment licensing, South Korea's Q4 custody framework deadline for banks, and Indonesia's Q3 OJK custody standards create a compressed 90-day implementation window across 200+ institutions from Sydney to Seoul. Philippines BSP escalated from registration to active compliance audits while Thailand expands multi-category licensing—all converging on transaction monitoring infrastructure upgrades representing $150M+ addressable mar
